response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song 'Hyper Jumpin'' via on-screen text and audio.
2. Performed search: "Hyper Jumpin'" Hololive 5th Generation Japanese and English lyrics.
3. Successfully found lyrics on Lyrical-Nonsense.
4. Mapped segments of the video as either song performance or informational screens.
response.global_summary: A promotional video for the Hololive 5th Generation concert 'ねぽらぼライブ re:VISION', featuring their song 'Hyper Jumpin'' with recurring segments of song performance and event information.

scenes.description: Live performance of 'Hyper Jumpin'' featuring Hololive 5th Generation. Text on-screen reads 'Hyper Jumpin''.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive 5th Generation (Momosuzu Nene, Omaru Polka, Shishiro Botan, Yukihana Lamy)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Hyper Jumpin' Now
Hyper Jumpin'
Hyper Jumpin' 飛び出そう
Come on baby 輝いて
ハートきゅんて Pump It up
Hyper Jumpin'
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hyper Jumpin' Now
Hyper Jumpin'
Hyper Jumpin', let's jump out
Come on baby, shine bright
Heart goes kyunn, Pump It up
Hyper Jumpin'
